chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1469 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 02.10.2025 Mr. Ghulam Mohiuddin Panhwar, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Bashir Ahmed Almani, Assistant Attorney General Counsel for the Petitioner wants to withdraw instant Petition as the Petitioner intends to avail his remedy before the appropriate forum. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
